Local account details in 9+ currencies $100 ● ANYONE Claim it Notion Calendar Always free Full app free — keyboard-first calendar, scheduling links, multi-account, Notion integration $60 ● ANYONE Claim it Mailgun Free Always free 100 messages/day free, 1 domain, 1-day retention $60 ● ANYONE Claim it Programs that died so you don't waste time → We track these so you don't apply to a program that quietly shut down. Last cleanup: May 2026. PlanetScale Hobby Tier Discontinued — all DBs now require paid Scaler Pro March 2024 · Try Neon, Supabase instead Fly.io Free Hobby Plan Killed for new users — only ~2 VM-hrs/7-day trial remains Oct 2024 · Try Render free, Oracle Always Free instead Railway Free Tier No permanent free tier — $5 trial then $5/mo Hobby minimum 2024 · Try Render free, Fly.io legacy instead SendGrid Free Plan Permanent free tier discontinued — replaced with 60-day trial May 2025 · Try Resend, Loops, Mailgun instead Bench Accounting Shut down — acquired by Employer.com Dec 2024 · Try Pilot (paid), Wave (free) instead Pioneer.app Stopped new investments 2024 · Try YC Startup School instead Buildspace Nights & Weekends Shut down — site shows farewell message 2025 · Try YC Startup School instead OpenAI bundle in MS Founders Hub Standalone OpenAI credits removed — must use Azure-routed access 2025 · Try OpenAI Startups Tier 1 directly instead Want 5 startup ideas every day? 100k+ founders get daily ideas, growth hacks and playbooks from Half Baked. Our mission is to make building and growing your startup more affordable, efficient, and connected. Think of us as your go-to resource for startup success. What is StartCamp? StartCamp is a startup-focused community that helps founders and entrepreneurs accelerate their journey with exclusive software deals, free credits, perks, and essential resources. By partnering with leading SaaS companies, we deliver unmatched savings and benefits designed to fuel early-stage growth. As a community-driven platform, our mission is simple: to make it easier, faster, and more affordable for startups to get off the ground and scale with confidence. What kind of deals does StartCamp offer? StartCamp provides exclusive deals on SaaS products and essential software tools widely used by startups and entrepreneurs. From marketing and sales platforms to cloud hosting, productivity, and finance tools, our curated offers cover every stage of building and scaling a business. With access to significant discounts and free credits, startups can save money on vital tools while focusing resources on growth and innovation. Can I try StartCamp for free? Yes! StartCamp offers a Free Plan designed specifically for early-stage startups and entrepreneurs. It’s the perfect way to explore our platform, access essential tools, and claim curated deals without any upfront cost. With the Free Plan, you can start building your startup toolkit right away and experience how StartCamp supports your journey from idea to growth.
